Package src

package src
  • Class
    Description
    J1vp0003
    J1-V-P0003 Worker Information Manager
    SalaryHistory
    Records the history of salary adjustments for a worker
    SalaryStatus
    Enum representing the status of a salary modifier UP: Salary increased DOWN: Salary decreased
    Validation
    Utility class for validating user input Refactored to use instance methods where possible to reduce static dependency
    Worker
    Represents a worker in the system which store personal information
    WorkerManagement
    Manager Class that controller the Data of the worker and salary history
